items.title: A photon was teleported across 270 meters in stunning quantum breakthrough
items.summary: Scientists have pulled off a first: teleporting a photon’s state between two separate quantum dots. This was done over a 270-meter open-air link, proving quantum information can travel between independent devices. The achievement marks a key step toward building quantum networks for ultra-secure com

items.title: 50-foot ancient snake discovered in India may be one of the largest ever
items.summary: A massive prehistoric snake discovered in India may rank among the largest ever to slither across Earth. Named Vasuki indicus, this ancient giant lived around 47 million years ago and is estimated to have stretched an astonishing 11 to 15 meters long—rivaling the legendary Titanoboa. Fossilized vert

items.title: Scientists catch antimatter “atom” acting like a wave for the first time
items.summary: Quantum physics once shocked scientists by revealing that particles can behave like waves—and now, that strange behavior has been pushed even further. For the first time, researchers have observed wave-like interference in positronium, an exotic “atom” made of an electron and its antimatter partner,

items.title: Scientists reveal the best exercise for knee arthritis pain relief
items.summary: A major review of 217 trials shows that aerobic exercise is the most effective option for managing knee osteoarthritis. Activities like walking, cycling, and swimming outperformed other exercise types in reducing pain and improving movement. While alternatives like strength training and mind-body ex

items.title: This AI knew the answers but didn’t understand the questions
items.summary: For decades, psychologists have debated whether the human mind can be explained by one unified theory or must be broken into separate parts like memory and attention.
